name: White Chocolate Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 1/4 oz reduced fat white cake mix
1 envelope Dream Whip® whipped topping mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare frosting: Beat vanilla frosting at medium speed in a mixing bowl. Gradually add the melted white chocolate discs. Beat at high speed for 30 seconds or until smooth and well blended. Fold in vanilla extract and whipped topping. Refrigerate.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Prepare a 13 x 9-inch (33 x 23 cm) baking pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
4. To prepare batter, combine cake mix, Dream Whip® whipped topping mix, and baking powder in a large bowl. In another bowl, whisk together water, egg whites, oil, and vanilla extract until just combined. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients until moistened. Gradually beat in the remaining melted white chocolate discs until well blended.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan.
6. Bake for 40 minutes or until cake is light brown and set.
7. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
8. Meanwhile, prepare filling: Over low heat, combine powdered sugar, semisweet chocolate chips, margarine (melted), and corn syrup in a saucepan. Cook until well blended and melted.
9. Spread the filling over warm cake.
10. Frost cake with remaining frosting. Refrigerate until serving. Let stand at room temperature for 10 minutes before cutting.
